title: Power Grid Corporation Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Power Grid Corporation Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Quality Control Engineer with drive and ambition, Power Grid Corporation Ventures Solutions in Thane is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Power Grid Corporation Ventures Solutions:
Power Grid Corporation Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Power Grid Corporation Ventures Solutions!
